_comment: Docs version manifest. The selector in the navbar reads this. 'Latest' is the live site at the root base; each other entry is a frozen snapshot built from that release's git tag and deployed under its own base path by .github/workflows/deploy-docs.yml. When you cut a new minor: bump the latest entry's `version`, add the previous minor as a new snapshot entry (newest first, after Latest), AND add a matching pair to DOC_SNAPSHOTS in deploy-docs.yml.
